intro: Spermacoce roxburghii, also known as Roxburgh's Spermacoce, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents of Spermacoce roxburghii include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, such as roxburghine, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, Spermacoce roxburghii is commonly prepared as an infusion or decoction, often in combination with other herbs, to treat various health conditions.
